projects.name: Test Templates
projects.description: Starter templates for all editor modes

cad.name: Mounting Plate
cad.description: Rectangular plate with center hole and 4 mounting holes. Outline, centerlines and dashed inner border on separate layers.

cad3d.name: Block with Pocket
cad3d.description: Rectangular solid body (60×40×25mm) with a circular pocket (ø24mm, depth 15mm). Sketch + Extrude + Pocket feature tree.

scene3d.name: Basic Scene
scene3d.description: Starter scene: floor, ambient + directional lights, box, sphere and cylinder primitives.

electronics.name: PCB Starter
electronics.description: 50.8×38.1mm PCB outline with mounting holes, copper pads, IC footprint and trace. Layers: PCB Outline / Copper / Silkscreen.
